jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at CarTrade
jsonLd.description:
CarTrade invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarTrade:
CarTrade is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade!
